summary: Comprehensive testing of FixPilot iteration 2 with JWT auth, expanded repair library (17 entries), Garage tab, and nearby shops. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly. Fixed datetime comparison bug in brute force lockout.

issues: React Native deprecation warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - Low priority, doesn't affect functionality (same as iteration 1)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Line 205 in /app/backend/server.py - Fixed datetime comparison bug in brute force lockout. Added timezone-aware check: if lockout.tzinfo is None: lockout = lockout.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc). This prevents TypeError when comparing offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes.
seed_data_creation: Test vehicles and diagnoses created during testing with TEST_ prefix for easy identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 2 features tested and working. JWT auth fully functional with Bearer tokens. Expanded repair library (17 entries) verified. Garage tab working with vehicle CRUD. Nearby shops endpoint functional. Brute force lockout fixed and working. All auth-protected endpoints properly secured. Frontend UI working correctly with 4 tabs. App is production-ready.

backend_tests.auth_register_new_user: PASS - Creates user with JWT tokens
backend_tests.auth_login_admin_success: PASS - Admin login returns tokens and role
backend_tests.auth_get_me_with_token: PASS - Returns user info with Bearer token
backend_tests.auth_refresh_token: PASS - Refresh token returns new access token
backend_tests.repair_library_new_entries: PASS - All 8 new entries present (transmission, exhaust, steering, AC, oil leak, tire/alignment, check engine, serpentine belt)
backend_tests.nearby_shops_endpoint: PASS - Returns results array with lat/lng
backend_tests.chat_with_auth: PASS - Chat works with Bearer token
backend_tests.vehicles_with_auth: PASS - Creates vehicle with auth, GET retrieves it
backend_tests.brute_force_lockout: PASS - 5 failed attempts trigger 429 lockout (FIXED: datetime comparison bug)

frontend_tests.login_screen_load: PASS - All form elements visible (email, password, submit, register link)
frontend_tests.admin_login: PASS - Admin credentials work, redirects to home
frontend_tests.registration_flow: PASS - Registration form works, creates account, auto-login
frontend_tests.tab_navigation: PASS - All 4 tabs working (Home, Diagnose, Garage, History)
frontend_tests.garage_tab_load: PASS - Garage screen loads with add button
frontend_tests.garage_add_vehicle: PASS - Add vehicle form works, saves vehicle
frontend_tests.garage_vehicle_display: PASS - Saved vehicle displays with nickname
frontend_tests.diagnose_tab: PASS - Diagnose screen loads with chat interface
frontend_tests.history_tab: PASS - History screen shows past diagnoses
frontend_tests.logout_button: PASS - Logout button visible in top right
frontend_tests.auth_redirect: PASS - Unauthenticated users redirect to login

jwt_authentication.details: Bearer token auth implemented correctly. Tokens stored in AsyncStorage. Auth context manages user state. Protected routes redirect to login.

expanded_repair_library.details: Library expanded from 9 to 17 entries. New entries: transmission-issue, exhaust-catalytic-converter, power-steering-issue, ac-heating-system, oil-leak, tire-alignment, check-engine-light, serpentine-belt. All entries have proper structure with tools, parts, videos.

garage_tab.details: 4th tab added successfully. Allows adding vehicles with year, make, model, engine, nickname. Vehicles display in list. Delete functionality working. Auth-protected endpoint.

nearby_shops.details: Google Places API integration working. POST /api/nearby-shops accepts lat/lng/radius. Returns nearby auto repair shops with name, rating, address, location.

auth_protected_endpoints.details: Vehicles endpoints require auth (401 without token). Diagnose and chat work with optional auth (associates user_id when authenticated). History returns user-specific data when authenticated.

brute_force_protection.details: 5 failed login attempts trigger 429 lockout for 15 minutes. Fixed datetime comparison bug that was causing 500 error.

mobile_design_review.touch_targets: All buttons tappable with proper hit areas
mobile_design_review.contrast: Dark steel theme with good contrast ratios
mobile_design_review.text_wrapping: All text properly wrapped in Text components
mobile_design_review.navigation: Expo Router navigation working smoothly with 4 tabs
mobile_design_review.garage_ui: Clean vehicle cards with nickname, year/make/model, delete button

bug_fixes_applied.issue: TypeError: can't subtract offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes in brute force lockout check
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Added timezone-aware check before datetime comparison: if lockout.tzinfo is None: lockout = lockout.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
